Our main contribution is Direct Preference Optimization (DPO), a simple RL-free algorithm for training language models from preferences.
Our experiments show that DPO is at least as effective as existing methods, including PPO-based RLHF, for learning from preferences in tasks such as sentiment modulation, summarization, and dialogue.
